# Dependencies
node_modules

# Build output
dist
dist-ssr
release

# Logs
logs
*.log
npm-debug.log*
yarn-debug.log*
yarn-error.log*
pnpm-debug.log*
lerna-debug.log*

# Environment
.env
.env.*
!.env.example
*.local

# OS
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db
Desktop.ini

# Editor
.vscode/*
!.vscode/extensions.json
.idea
*.suo
*.ntvs*
*.njsproj
*.sln
*.sw?

@echo off
setlocal
set "RELEASE=%~dp0release"
cd /d "%~dp0"

echo Closing any running Smash Drums Editor / Electron...
taskkill /F /IM "Smash Drums Editor.exe" /T >nul 2>&1
taskkill /F /IM electron.exe /T >nul 2>&1
timeout /t 1 /nobreak >nul

echo Building Smash Drums Editor...
call npm run desktop:build
if errorlevel 1 (
  echo.
  echo Build failed.
  echo If you see EPERM, close Smash Drums Editor, pause OneDrive sync, then run this again.
  pause
  exit /b 1
)

if exist "%RELEASE%\Smash-Drums-Editor-0.1.0-portable.exe" (
  echo.
  echo Done:
  echo %RELEASE%\Smash-Drums-Editor-0.1.0-portable.exe
) else (
  echo.
  echo Build finished but portable EXE was not found in:
  echo %RELEASE%
)
pause

@echo off
setlocal
set "RELEASE=%~dp0release"
set "EXE=%RELEASE%\Smash-Drums-Editor-0.1.0-portable.exe"
set "UNPACKED=%RELEASE%\win-unpacked\Smash Drums Editor.exe"

if exist "%EXE%" (
  start "" "%EXE%"
  exit /b 0
)
if exist "%UNPACKED%" (
  start "" "%UNPACKED%"
  exit /b 0
)

echo Smash Drums Editor EXE not found.
echo Run "Build Smash Drums Editor.bat" to create it.
pause
exit /b 1

{
  "name": "smash-drums-editor",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "description": "Desktop chart editor for Smash Drums custom songs",
  "author": "",
  "keywords": ["smash-drums", "chart-editor", "electron", "react", "vite"],
  "type": "module",
  "main": "electron/main.cjs",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "vite",
    "build": "tsc -b && vite build",
    "lint": "oxlint",
    "desktop:dev": "concurrently -k \"vite\" \"wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5174 && cross-env ELECTRON_START_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5174 electron .\"",
    "desktop:clean": "node scripts/clean-release.cjs",
    "desktop:build": "npm run build && node scripts/clean-release.cjs && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.config.cjs",
    "postinstall": "node scripts/ensure-electron.cjs"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "jszip": "^3.10.1",
    "react": "^19.2.7",
    "react-dom": "^19.2.7",
    "zustand": "^5.0.14"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/node": "^24.13.2",
    "@types/react": "^19.2.17",
    "@types/react-dom": "^19.2.3",
    "@vitejs/plugin-react": "^6.0.2",
    "concurrently": "^9.2.1",
    "cross-env": "^7.0.3",
    "electron": "^35.7.5",
    "electron-builder": "^26.0.12",
    "oxlint": "^1.69.0",
    "typescript": "~6.0.2",
    "vite": "^8.1.0",
    "wait-on": "^8.0.5"
  }
}

# Smash Drums Editor

A desktop chart editor for [Smash Drums](https://smashdrums.com/) custom songs. Built with React, TypeScript, Vite, and Electron.

## Features

- Edit drum charts with a visual highway editor
- Import and export Smash Drums / Indies chart formats
- Waveform view, BPM detection, and timing tools
- Song metadata, phases, and timing anchors
- Portable Windows build (no installer required)

## Requirements

- [Node.js](https://nodejs.org/) 20 or newer
- npm 10 or newer
- Windows (for building the portable `.exe`)

## Getting started

```bash
git clone https://github.com/JStillxSKS/SmashDrumsEditor.git
cd SmashDrumsEditor
npm install
```

### Development

Run the app in Electron with hot reload:

```bash
npm run desktop:dev
```

Or run the web UI only in the browser:

```bash
npm run dev
```

### Production build

Build the web assets:

```bash
npm run build
```

Build the portable Windows executable:

```bash
npm run desktop:build
```

The output is written to `release/Smash-Drums-Editor-0.1.0-portable.exe`.

On Windows you can also double-click:

- `Dev Smash Drums Editor.bat` — development mode
- `Build Smash Drums Editor.bat` — build the portable EXE
- `Open Smash Drums Editor.bat` — launch the built app

## Scripts

| Script | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `npm run dev` | Vite dev server (browser only) |
| `npm run desktop:dev` | Vite + Electron dev mode |
| `npm run build` | Type-check and build web assets to `dist/` |
| `npm run desktop:build` | Build web assets and package portable Windows EXE |
| `npm run desktop:clean` | Clean unpacked build artifacts in `release/` |
| `npm run lint` | Run Oxlint |

## Project structure

```
electron/          Electron main process and static file server
public/            Static assets (app icon, etc.)
scripts/           Build helper scripts
src/
  components/      React UI components
  store/           Zustand editor state
  theme/           Highway / canvas palette
  types/           Chart and metadata types
  utils/           Chart I/O, audio, timing helpers
```

## License

This project is not affiliated with or endorsed by Smash Drums. Use and distribution are at your own discretion.

{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "tsBuildInfoFile": "./node_modules/.tmp/tsconfig.app.tsbuildinfo",
    "target": "es2023",
    "lib": ["ES2023", "DOM"],
    "module": "esnext",
    "types": ["vite/client"],
    "skipLibCheck": true,

    /* Bundler mode */
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "allowImportingTsExtensions": true,
    "verbatimModuleSyntax": true,
    "moduleDetection": "force",
    "noEmit": true,
    "jsx": "react-jsx",

    /* Linting */
    "noUnusedLocals": true,
    "noUnusedParameters": true,
    "erasableSyntaxOnly": true,
    "noFallthroughCasesInSwitch": true
  },
  "include": ["src"]
}

{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "tsBuildInfoFile": "./node_modules/.tmp/tsconfig.node.tsbuildinfo",
    "target": "es2023",
    "lib": ["ES2023"],
    "types": ["node"],
    "skipLibCheck": true,

    /* Bundler mode */
    "module": "nodenext",
    "allowImportingTsExtensions": true,
    "verbatimModuleSyntax": true,
    "moduleDetection": "force",
    "noEmit": true,

    /* Linting */
    "noUnusedLocals": true,
    "noUnusedParameters": true,
    "erasableSyntaxOnly": true,
    "noFallthroughCasesInSwitch": true
  },
  "include": ["vite.config.ts"]
}
